## Frozen inventory

- 17 components; 24 powers `PWR-01`–`PWR-24` Available Inactive.
- 24 workflows `DSC-WF-01`–`DSC-WF-24` / canonical headings `WF-01`–`WF-24` in Preview Only.
- 30 functional templates `TPL-01`–`TPL-30`.
- 18 executable closed JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 documents with per-document, descriptor and bundle hashes.
- Ten optional agents `AGT-01`–`AGT-10`, all PERM-P0 Disabled.
- Ten canonical synthetic fixtures/adapters and 160 criteria `RA-A01`–`RA-R08` + `RA-INT01`–`RA-INT16`.
- One canonical `My DISCOVER Mission Control` at `/healthcare-research-innovation-leaders/dashboard`; only `/healthcare-research-innovation-leaders/mission-control` is its alias; no global alias.

Mappings, component order, identities and hashes are immutable within version 1.0.0. A material change requires a new version, affected-domain retest and new receipts.
